skills.level.1.name: Familiar
skills.level.1.desc: Exposure through adjacent work — I've operated in systems built on it without using it hands-on.
skills.level.2.name: Working knowledge
skills.level.2.desc: Hands-on with the fundamentals; comfortable on straightforward, well-scoped tasks.
skills.level.3.name: Proficient
skills.level.3.desc: Use it independently in day-to-day work and handle most common scenarios with confidence.
skills.level.4.name: Advanced
skills.level.4.desc: Strong, assured command — I take on complex problems and support teammates working with it.
skills.level.5.name: Expert
skills.level.5.desc: Deep, daily mastery — a go-to reference who can architect solutions and mentor others.
